languages.text: "Разве техножрецам Омниссии дозволено работать с живой плотью? Я дума{mf|л|ла} вы ее презираете".
"Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."
languages.original_text: "Разве техножрецам Омниссии дозволено работать с живой плотью? Я дума{mf|л|ла} вы ее презираете".

traits.locale_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I believed you hold it in contempt."
"Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I believed you hold it in contempt."
"Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."
"Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚的技术神甫真的可以处理活体血肉吗？我还以为你们对血肉嗤之以鼻呢。”
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: “欧姆尼赛亚的技术神甫真的可以处理活体血肉吗？我还以为你们对血肉嗤之以鼻呢。”

languages.text: «¿Tienen permitido siquiera los tecnosacerdotes del Omnissiah trabajar con carne viva? Creía que usted lo detestaba».
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: «¿Tienen permitido siquiera los tecnosacerdotes del Omnissiah trabajar con carne viva? Creía que usted lo detestaba».

languages.text: « Les technoprêtres de l'Omnimessie sont-ils seulement autorisés à travailler sur de la chair vivante ? Je pensais que vous la méprisiez. »
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: « Les technoprêtres de l'Omnimessie sont-ils seulement autorisés à travailler sur de la chair vivante ? Je pensais que vous la méprisiez. »

languages.text: "Ist es den Techpriestern des Omnissiah überhaupt erlaubt, mit lebendem Fleisch zu arbeiten? Ich dachte, Ihr verachtet es."
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: "Ist es den Techpriestern des Omnissiah überhaupt erlaubt, mit lebendem Fleisch zu arbeiten? Ich dachte, Ihr verachtet es."

languages.text: "Hermesih'in Tekno Rahiplerinin canlı bedenlerle çalışmasına izin veriliyor mu? Bu durumu hor gördüğünüzü sanıyordum."
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in Tekno Rahiplerinin canlı bedenlerle çalışmasına izin veriliyor mu? Bu durumu hor gördüğünüzü sanıyordum."

languages.text: オムニシアのテクプリストは生きた肉体と仕事をすることさえ許されているのですか？生きた肉体は軽蔑されていると思っていました。
languages.original_text: "Are the Tech-Priests of the Omnissiah even allowed to work with living flesh? I thought you hold it in contempt."

traits.locale_text: オムニシアのテクプリストは生きた肉体と仕事をすることさえ許されているのですか？生きた肉体は軽蔑されていると思っていました。
